stemHtml: What are the main components of a turbine engine starting system?

options.a: A starter and an igniter to ignite the air/fuel mixture in the combustion system.
options.b: High-pressure fuel pumps and a compressor to raise the pressure of the air/fuel mixture for starting.
options.c: A turbine to compress and ignite the air/fuel mixture in the combustion chamber.
options.d: A combustion chamber, a starter, and bleed air to ignite the air/fuel mixture.
